creator: carlos.horowicz@gmail.com
text:
make package doesn't work on p5-Mail-SpamAssassin

Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/packages/All/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.5_1.tbz'
tar: lib/perl5/5.8.8/man/man3/Mail::SpamAssassin::Util::DependencyInfo.3.gz: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/perl5/5.8.8/man/man3/Mail::SpamAssassin::Util::RegistrarBoundaries.3.gz: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin.
*** Error code 1

Fix: 

# $FreeBSD: /usr/local/www/cvsroot/FreeBSD/ports/mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/Makefile,v 1.121 2008/08/21 14:39:58 glewis Exp $
+# $FreeBSD: /usr/local/www/cvsroot/FreeBSD/ports/mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/Makefile,v 1.122 2009/01/14 15:40:16 tobez Exp $
 #
 
 PORTNAME=    Mail-SpamAssassin
 PORTVERSION=    3.2.5
+PORTREVISION=    1
 CATEGORIES=    mail perl5
 MASTER_SITES=    ${MASTER_SITE_APACHE:S/$/:apache/} ${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN:S/$/:cpan/}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    spamassassin/source/:apache Mail/:cpan
@@ -169,7 +170,9 @@ MAN3=        Mail::SpamAssassin.3 \
         Mail::SpamAssassin::SubProcBackChannel.3 \
         Mail::SpamAssassin::Timeout.3 \
         Mail::SpamAssassin::Util.3 \
+        Mail::SpamAssassin::Util::DependencyInfo.3 \
         Mail::SpamAssassin::Util::Progress.3 \
+        Mail::SpamAssassin::Util::RegistrarBoundaries.3 \
         spamassassin-run.3
 
MAN1=        spamd.1 spamassassin.1 spamc.1 sa-learn.1 sa-update.1 \
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin
make package
